text: Internet ka vah time main hamesha miss karunga

padta hai kyunki kisi bhi product ke

hoon kyunki main main baat karna chahta hoon

main baat karna chahta hoon without any

ka chai aur coat pe aur aaj hum ek thoda sa nai

to naya hai naya to nahin hai yeh product but
iske ek thoda sa overview aapko doonga taaki
aap iske true potential ke baare mein jaan
paayen aur isko shayad use bhi kar paayen agar

product ka naam hai hamare Superbase aur in
case agar aapne nahin suna hai to yeh aapke

liye. Abhi main aapko aur bhi discuss karte hain

through aaya tha aur sirf akela Superbase nahin
Hai. Aise bahut saare aur bhi product market
mein hain. Aapne Firebase ka naam suna hoga.
Firebase bhi isi category ke andar aata hai.
Aapne Appwrite ka bhi naam suna hoga. Vah bhi
isi category ke andar aata hai. Inko
actually mein jo bola jaata hai vah bola
jaata hai base back end as a service. To hua
kya ki bahut saare log kuch na kuch
application build karna chahte the aur un
application ke andar kuch jo processes hai
vo hamesha se same hi rehti hain. Jaise ki auth
aapko Google log in karna hai, email log in
karna hai, forgot password karna hai. Ye sab
bada hi common hai. Har ek application ko kuch
na kuch DB lagta hi hai. Kuch na kuch
storage lagta hi lagta hai. Ab vo storage
AWS se lo, Digital Ocean se lo, kisi
aur third party se lo vo lagega hi lagega.
Iske alawa kabhi kabhaar hume real time bhi
kuch access lagta hai. To ye jo kuch
components hain ye hamesha har application ke
andar jab bhi aap kuch startup build karoge,
product build karoge, same hi milega. To
kuch logon ne socha ki yaar yah jo back end
as a service hai, hum is concept ko leke
aate hain. And user ko hum directly in
sabka easy access de denge. Hum kuch API
banayenge aur un API ke through aap seedha kaam
kar sakte ho. Kehne ka matlab yah hai ki aap
apni application puri tarah se React mein
likh sakte ho. Haan ji. Next years bhi
nahin. Puri tarah se aap apni application
React ke andar likh sakte ho. Aap kabhi bhi in
service se baat nahin karte. Aap baat karte ho
in back end as a service se aur yeh aapse baat
karti hai wapas. Aapko sirf ek API seekhni
hoti hai ki kaise inki API se main baat
karunga aur that's it. Inhi ke through saara
datawata sab kuch manage hota hai aur yeh aapko
bada hi saste daamon pe kaam karke de dete
hain. Ab isi ke andar ek product aata hai
Superbase. Aur bhi products hain. Eventually
future mein hum un pe bhi baat karenge. But yeh
hote hain back end as a service. Ab
recently Superbase isliye aur zyada nazron
mein aaya ki Superbase kaafi aage pahunch gaya
hai uske funding rounds mein. Unhone abhi
Series E kiya hai. To aisa halke mein
product nahin hai. Now they are well
established well funded. $ million race kare
hain. Koi chhota amount nahin hota hai. $00
million yeh proof deta hai ki company bahut hi
stable hai aur Series E tak pahunch gayi hai ab.
Aur inka valuation $5 billion hai. Ab aap
kahenge yeh 5 billion valuation kaise
pahucha? Kyunki Superbase ne kuch ek
interesting aisa kaam kiya jo baaki ke Fire
base ya iske aur compete nahin kar paaye. Wo
kya hai? Inhone AI ka help liya. Ab
aap kahenge kya inhone AI se kuch banaya?
Nahin ji inhone AI ke saath integrate
kara. Ab AI ka kaam kya hai? Jaise aapne
service suni hogi Bolt V0 in pe bhi hum
videos banayenge. To in service ke andar bhi
aap kya karte ho? Aap ek complete application
banate ho. Ab wo application ho sakta hai koi
bhi quiz ho ya jo bhi aapko banane ka man
ho. To ek complete aapko application banani
hai.
Wapas se wahi baat complete agar application
banegi to usko bhi to database auth yeh saari
service milegi. To inhone kya kaha ki
AI se jo application banti hai na isme bhi
hum Supabase ka direct integration de
dete hain. To AI se aap app banaiye lekin
integration jo back end as a service hai wo
hamara as it is Supabase ka use kar lo. Ye
jo inka collaboration hai isne inko bahut
zyada valuation di. Aap Bolt dekhiye
ya fir aap V0 dekhiye aap kahin pe bhi jaiye
inka integration aapko almost takriban sabhi
jagah milega. And for the right reason kyunki
actually mein inki API bahut achhi hain.
Ab haan behind the scene ye kya dete hain
aapko? Wo kuch zyada complex nahin hai.
Behind the scene aapko mostly ek Postgres
database hi milta hai. Ab aap kahenge
Postgres to main bhi spin kar sakta hoon.

layers hain na auth, DB, storage vagairah yeh
sab aapko database ke saath nahi milta. yah
aapko base ke saath milta hai back end edge a
service ke saath main. to ye poori-poori kahani
hai. ab aate hain hum super base pe. to super
base pe aap jaoge. hum actually main use bhi
karte hain. mere kaafi projects bhi hain.
eventually future mein main aapko kuch aise
project se introduce bhi karvaunga jo
ki purely super base pe bane hue hain.
in fact agar aapne recently Dhruv Rathi ka
jo startup dekha tha wo bhi completely
super base pe hai. to scale to kaafi acche
se handle kar leta hai. usmein koi bhi do raah
nahi hai. Dhruv Rathi obvious si baat hai
bade YouTuber hain aur kaafi zyada unke paas
volume aata hai, traffics aata hai, hit
aata hai. wo saara ka saara sab kuch imagine
super base handle kar gaya hai. ab super base ke
andar aap jaake dekhoge product ke andar to
dekho wahi sab jo cheezein maine batai database
milta hai, auth milta hai, storage milta hai,
edge function, real time in sabhi pe ek-ek pe
ye saare topics kyunki aapko pata hone

hum future mein baat karenge. vector cron
kas ye thode se different hai. ye kabhi-kabhi use
aate hain. but actually main ye bade
interesting cheezein hain. to aapko ye bada
easily mil jata hai. ab aapko ek
interesting dikhata hoon inke
Documentation ke upar. To suppose kariye hum
jate hain Authentication ke andar ki theek hai
mujhe Authentication ke baare mein padhna hai ki
main kaise Authentication integrate kar sakta
hoon. Aap simply Documentation pe jaiye aur
yahan pe aapko left side mein scroll bar
hai ki suppose kariye mujhe Google ke saath log
in yahan pe integrate karna hai. To hum yahan
pe email password social logins auth. To ye
social log in hai. Mujhe Google ke saath karna
hai jo ki common hai. To main yahan se bilkul
aasani se padh sakta hoon. Aur poora ka poora
project setup se leke web mein hai,
expo mein hai, flutter mein hai, kis mein hai?
yeh sabke saath aapko integration dete hain.
Inhone step by step guide itna easily
de rakha hai ki koi bhi isko replicate kar
sakta hai. Tutorial mein to khair hum karte
hi hain but bada hi easy hai. Par aap dekhenge
is Documentation ka yeh jo right side hai,
yeh itna bhi bada nahi hai. Aapko saare
steps yahan mil jate hain badi aasani se
aur koi lengthy process nahi hai. Yahi kaam
yeh karta hai super base ki cheezon ko aasan
banata hai. Ab aap kahenge ki theek hai, ek aur
nai cheez seekhni padegi. Lekin iske saath mujhe
jo interesting cheez lagi jo ki seekhne layak
hai, worth it hai. Jab aap iske products
mein jate hain to aapko database dikhega. Ab
dekhiye database apne aap mein complex
cheez hai. usko itna aasani se handle nahi
kiya ja sakta. but iske jab aap database ko
padhte hain tab actually main technically sahi
maayne mein aap pure SQL database ko hi
padhte hain. aur specially Postgres ko aap
bahut depth mein padhte hain. yeh help bhi
karta hai aapko SQL editor. in fact
seekhne mein bhi help karta hai ki kis tarah se
Postgres ko manage kiya jaata hai, handle
kiya jaata hai. ek sabse interesting cheez jo
aapko yeh baar-baar sikhata hai wo hai RLS.
ab ye RLS kya cheez hai? haan ji ye
nai-nai cheezen aap comments mein batate jaayega.
aisi nai-nai cheezen jaanne mein maza aata hai
kya? seekhne mein maza aata hai kya? to
RLS ek hai row level security ya phir
isko row security policies bhi bolte hain.
aapko kai jagah search karne ko milega
Postgres row level security. main
RLS hi bolta hoon. kai jagah isko row
security bhi bola jaata hai. dono ek hi
cheezen hain. ab dekho ye karta kya hai? main
aapko yahan se ek definition dikhata hoon chhoti
si. usse aapko bada easily samajh mein aa
jaayega. ab sadly iska dark mode nahi hai.
to row level security is a Postgres
security feature provided by the open
source Postgres database. theek hai ji.
kahani samajh mein aayi ki Postgres aapko ye
feature provide karta hai. it allows database
Administrator to define policies to
control how specific row of data
display and operate for one aur more more
user role. Ab dekhiye sabse badi baat kya
aati hai? Aisi service ko jaise hi aap use
karte ho aur main aapko bolta hoon ki aap
react se direct database se baat karoge
jo ki base aise lagta hai ki Postgres se
baat kar rahe hain. To sabse bada jo question
aata hai ki yaar koi beech mein back end hi
nahi hai. Koi protection layer hi nahi hai.
Data leak ho gaya ya kuch ho gaya kaise hoga?
Obvious si baat hai yeh concern sabko rehta
hai. Mujhe bhi rehta hai. Hamesha hi rehta hai.
Lekin jo Postgres aapke saath karta hai ya
phir aapko yeh super base jo aapko feature deta
hai wo ye row level security aapko khud se
customize likhne ko deta hai. Iske andar aap
kya kar sakte ho ki har ek database ki row
ke upar aap policies laga sakte ho ki kaun si
row kaun read kar sakta hai? Kya anonymous user
ek row read kar sakta hai? Kya locked in user
doosre ki rows read kar sakta hai ya sirf khud
ki hi row read kar sakta hai ya phir doosre ki
rows read kar sakta hai par usmein write nahi kar
sakta hai. Kitni permissions kya hai iske baare
mein bahut acche se detail aapko padhne ko
milta hai. Ab jab bhi aap koi product
banayenge startup banayenge to wahan pe
sabse zyada aapke liye jo kaam aayega wo role
Level security ka hai. Agar aap comments
mein bolenge to hum ek properly dedicated
crash course ya at least ek discussion guide
to rakhenge hi ki kis tarah se role level
securities pe baat ki jaati hai aur kya
hota hai. To aap bataiyega mujhe comment section
mein agar aapka man hai to us pe bhi ek detail
discussion karenge. But sabse easy hai ki aap is
URL pe jaiyega. I think Satori
a common vt company Satori
waise mat samjhiyega. Yeh actually mein ho sakta
hai Japanese company ho. But yahan par bada hi
achha article hai. Pura yeh raw level
securities ki policy kya hoti hai?
policy selective kaise hoti hai? Kaise kya
karte hain? Inhone kaafi achha de rakha hai.
Kabhi hum bhi aur easy bana ke iska example
dekhenge. But samajhne wali aur sabse
interesting baat ye hai ki in jaisi service
ko jaise super base hai inke saath kaam karne se
inke saath padhne se aapko database ke baare
mein aur jaanne ko milta hai. Specially row
level security ke baare mein jaanne ko
milta hai. In fact jo super base ke
founders hain unhone bahut kaam kara hai

Firebase apne aap mein ek own product hai.
Unka khud ka internal database hai. Wo nahi
batate ki kaun sa database hum use kar rahe
hain. But alag-alag hai. Jaise aap appwrite use
karte hain to aap Maria DB ke baare mein
zyada seekhte hain kyunki wo built on top
of Maria DB hai. Jo ki MySQL ka bhai
bandhu kah lo aur Supabase jo hai wo aapko
purely Postgres ka instance dete hain.
Aap Postgres ke baare mein zyada seekhte
ho. But haan life mein kuch database ke saath
to jam ke panga lena chahiye. Chahe wo MySQL
ho, chahe wo Mongo DB ho, chahe wo
Postgres ho. Jitna zyada database pe
command hogi, jitna zyada aap database ko
jaanenge, utne acche developer aap banenge. To
bas yahi kahani thi. To humne socha ki yaar ek
video to banta hi hai. Atleast jo mere
vichar hain ki kaise ye use hota hai, kya
hota hai? jo log pehli baar dekh rahe hain ya
jo log soch rahe hain ki full stack application
main kaise banaun? to haan, inko use karke aap
full stack application bade aaram se bana sakte
hain. bas yahi tha. abhi aur bhi aise products
hain jinke baare mein main khul ke baat karna
chahta hoon. kuch naye tools bhi mile hain mujhe
to karenge un par jam ke baat karenge. aap bas
